Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to add constraints to mitigate bias The given model has activities StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo We need to introduce sensitive attributes like ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace and activities like ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck CheckApplicantRace etc

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: But the original model does not have those So we must invent some activities that represent sensitive attribute checks or manual reviews

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The problem says add new constraints that limit the process bias and suggests adding activities like ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck CheckApplicantRace Since the model is a dictionary of constraints we can add constraints involving new activity names Thats acceptable

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Better to have generic activities CheckApplicantRace and ManualReview Then add constraints like After CheckApplicantRace there must be a ManualReview before FinalDecision

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We want to ensure that if a sensitive attribute is checked then a ManualReview must occur before any decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That could be a precedence constraint ManualReview precedes FinalDecision Or we could have a response CheckApplicantRace to ManualReview and also a nonsuccession constraint CheckApplicantRace to FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Coexistence already implies both are present but not ordering To enforce order we can add precedence ManualReview FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will add coexistence between ManualReview and FinalDecision response from CheckApplicantRace to ManualReview nonsuccession from CheckApplicantRace to FinalDecision and precedence from ManualReview to FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to preserve the original constraints So we update the dictionary by adding new entries to existing constraint types and possibly adding new constraint types if not present but they are all present as empty dicts
